user.description: Enter your Planet Fitness Australia member portal credentials.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Planet Fitness
reauth_confirm.description: Your Planet Fitness session for {email} has expired. Re-enter your password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Planet Fitness portal.

init.description: Polling and occupancy-model settings. The counter window is the portal's fixed removal timer (how long a member scan stays in the reported count); real dwell is the assumed average time a member actually spends in the club.

error.dwell_exceeds_window: Real dwell cannot be longer than the counter window.
